summary: Issue #425 analytics ETL re-review: intent-review spec_fidelity=pass consumed as given. Prior CRITICAL product_detail snapshot_key collision and live grain unwiring verified fixed. All 4 ACs mapped to tests. No new CRITICAL reliability/security/observability/performance gaps; RLS on new table; DLQ/idempotency paths tested. Non-blocking smells/convention notes and poll fan-out/sync_state warnings imported.

criticalFindings.description: Intent-review smell (non-blocking): SKU and product detail loops repeat rate-limit / detail-fetch / list-fallback blocks.
criticalFindings.suggestion: Optional: extract shared list+detail handoff helper in a follow-up.
criticalFindings.shipAsIsReason: Structural duplication is non-blocking per intent-review; behavior is tested and correct for Fujiwa MVP catalog sizes.

criticalFindings.description: Intent-review smell (non-blocking): large analytics expander block added to commerce mapping module.
criticalFindings.suggestion: Consider analytics-specific mapping submodule if module grows further.
criticalFindings.shipAsIsReason: Co-location with existing TikTok normalizers is acceptable for P2-A2 slice; split deferred.

criticalFindings.description: Intent-review smell (non-blocking): grain + date window + entity ids recur across expanders; mitigated by _base_analytics_payload.
criticalFindings.suggestion: Keep _base_analytics_payload as shared helper; revisit if more grains added.
criticalFindings.shipAsIsReason: _base_analytics_payload already centralizes snapshot_key construction; acceptable for current grain set.

criticalFindings.description: Intent-review convention note: AnalyticsPerformanceInterval / AnalyticsPerformanceRepo not listed in database MODULE public API.
criticalFindings.suggestion: Add model/repo to MODULE.md Public Interface after schema stabilizes.

criticalFindings.description: Intent-review convention note: MODULE still says LIVE A-26–A-29 not wired while A-28 live session list is wired in sync.py.
criticalFindings.suggestion: Update polling MODULE Key Behaviors to reflect A-28 live handoff wiring.

criticalFindings.description: Reliability: sync_state watermarks (shop_sku_performance_last_sync_at, shop_product_performance_last_sync_at) are set before per-entity detail handoffs complete; mid-cycle rate-limit break skips remaining catalog.
criticalFindings.suggestion: Advance sync_state only after successful handoff batch; log skipped entity count when rate limit breaks the fan-out loop.
criticalFindings.shipAsIsReason: Matches #424 poll watermark pattern; Fujiwa read-only catalog is small; partial progress preferable to stalling entire poll on tail SKU/product failures.

criticalFindings.description: Performance: sync_analytics issues one detail GET per SKU/product under 10/min RateLimiter — large catalogs extend poll duration and may leave tail entities unprocessed when acquire fails.
criticalFindings.suggestion: Monitor Fujiwa fan-out; consider cursor/resume or capped batch handoffs if catalog size grows.
criticalFindings.shipAsIsReason: RateLimiter + list-row fallback already bound worst-case behavior; list fallback preserves partial metrics for rate-limited entities.

criticalFindings.description: Observability: _handoff_analytics_rows silently continues when grain is unknown (no log/metric).
criticalFindings.suggestion: Log warning with grain value when channel lookup misses.
criticalFindings.shipAsIsReason: Expanders only emit known grains today; silent skip is defensive for malformed payloads routed through same helper.

interfaceChanges.description: Canonical analytics_performance_intervals table with unique (shop_id, snapshot_key) upsert key.
ShopScopedRepo upsert by snapshot_key with update_time staleness guard.
Four analytics ingest channels merged into RAW_CHANNELS.
Maps normalized poll payloads to analytics_performance upsert kwargs; DLQ on missing start_date.
A-28 live session list pagination helper for sync_analytics handoff.
Hands off shop/sku/product/live normalized rows to ETL; product_detail passes product_id; A-28 live sessions wired.

driftDetails.note: AnalyticsPerformanceInterval / AnalyticsPerformanceRepo not in public interface list.
LIVE wiring docs stale relative to A-28 handoff in sync.py.

mappings.criterion: Idempotent upserts keyed by shop + grain + date window (product_id, sku_id, live_id per identifier catalog)
Maps analytics metrics (gmv, ctr, click_through_rate, sku_orders, etc.) without fabricating missing fields
DLQ / error taxonomy consistent with existing ETL consumer
Integration test: poll fixture → handoff → Postgres row

recommendations: Update polling/MODULE.md to document A-28 live session handoff wiring.
Add database/MODULE.md public API entry for AnalyticsPerformanceRepo when schema stabilizes.
Monitor Fujiwa poll fan-out under RateLimiter; log unknown grains if expanders diverge.

reviewerSignoff.statement: Intent-review spec_fidelity=pass; prior product_detail collision and live unwiring verified fixed. Guardrails found no CRITICAL gaps. Accepted ship-as-is for sync_state watermark timing, detail fan-out, silent grain skip, and non-blocking structure smells. Security: RLS on analytics_performance_intervals; logs use platform IDs only.

ownerSignoff.statement: Acknowledged WARNING findings; all four acceptance criteria mapped to unit/integration tests.

priorReviewBlockers.resolution: expand_analytics_product_detail includes product_id in snapshot_key; sync loop passes product_id kwarg; unit test asserts distinct keys for prod-a vs prod-b.
A-28 list_live_performance_all wired to expand_analytics_live_session → tiktok.analytics.live.raw; integration test asserts live handoff and Postgres row.
